title: Minimum Number of Flips to Make the Binary String Alternating
titleCn: 使二进制字符串字符交替的最少反转次数

testcases.input: s = "111000" Output: 2 Explanation: Use the first operation two times to make s = "100011". Then, use the second operation on the third and sixth elements to make s = "101010".
testcases.expectedOutput: 2 Explanation: Use the first operation two times to make s = "100011". Then, use the second operation on the third and sixth elements to make s = "101010".

testcases.input: s = "010" Output: 0 Explanation: The string is already alternating.
s = "1110" Output: 1 Explanation: Use the second operation on the second element to make s = "1010".
testcases.expectedOutput: 1 Explanation: Use the second operation on the second element to make s = "1010".
